episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4001_1:
It was decided that Pasio Academy would
host a school fair.

It was still a long way off, but the students
were already planning all sorts of
attractions...

I’m thinking of taking part in the school
fair myself...

but I haven’t the slightest clue what to do
for it—or who with.

Until recently, I was kinda skipping classes at
the academy in Paldea...

so I’m not really sure what people do at
school fairs.

If I can do something with my buddies,
that’d be best.

Time wasted is lost! No point standing
around thinking!
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/6801_1:
So you’re teachers AND
students, huh?

It feels kinda strange studying alongside
a teacher.
Don’t worry! No need to be formal!

Same for me! Now look at the camera and
give me a smile!
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4002_1: You must be that photographer.
Yep—Perrin! Did Juliana tell you about me?
Heya, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!

Huh? You know
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?

This is Sonia! She’s a Pokémon Professor
from Galar!
Whoa... Galar!
Nice to meet you! And, uh, you are...?

I’m Arven!
[Name:PlayerNickname ]’s bud!
Nice to meet ya!
By the way, what’s with the outfits?

Oh, right. This is our first time meeting
[Name:PlayerNickname ] as fellow
students.

Since you two are a professor and a
photographer, I figured you were here
as teachers.
Of course! We normally teach classes.

But right now, we’re just like everyone
else—students enjoying school life!

And dressing like this really makes me
wanna cover what’s happening on campus!
Happening on campus...?
Yup!

We’re covering the school fair for the
Pasio Academy newsletter!

We’re snapping shots of students prepping
for it.

And we’ll run a feature on it all right up
until the fair!

Huh. So that’s what’s happening behind
the scenes.

Photos taken by an outsider have a totally
different vibe from those by a student.
A student’s perspective feels fresh and fun!
I thought Perrin’s eye would be perfect.

So while we’re covering the story, we’ll be
students!

Say, why don’t you two join us while we
cover the fair?
You don’t mind?

Of course not. You’re trying to decide how
to get involved, right?
Seeing what everyone’s planning might help.
Yeah, good point!
Then it’s settled! Let’s go!

Come to think of it, I heard some are doing
their prep outside the academy.

If we’re interviewing people all over Pasio,
getting to them could be tough.
No worries. Leave that to us!

With these two helping out, we can fly
anywhere in a flash!
Whoa! We’re in good hands, then!
All right! Let’s go cover the school fair!
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4003_1: This group’s planning a haunted house!

So...what’s special about your
haunted house?

Well... We’re really particular about the
costumes and staging...

We want everyone to experience how
awesome ghost Pokémon are!

And our biggest selling point is an
authentic scare.

You see, our haunted house doesn’t rely
on costumes.

That’s the real thing all right... I’m worried
the visitors will pass out.
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4004_1:
In our band, we don’t care whether you’re a
pro or not!

Not only that—we welcome anything music
related, whether it’s singing, playing an
instrument, dancing... It’s all welcome!
We plan to have a stage for performances!

We’re gonna let people walk on and join us
the day of, too, so we’re not done recruiting!
This is great! Give me some more poses!

Hanging with pals who like the same stuff...
That’s a good attraction!
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4005_1:
At our café, we plan to serve handmade
sweets and drinks!
We’ll give every guest our full focus!
No, I’ll be taking a supervisory role.
He’s helping us with our service and menu.

We want to advertise as a proper café,
managed by a real, professional butler!

If we’re talking cooking, I might be able to
help people enjoy the fair.
Hey! If you’ll have me, I’ll join your café!

Of course! I’ve heard great things about your
cooking!
Yeah! You’d be a huge help!

Thanks for bringing us such a dependable
staff member!

Hehe! See? We big sisters are useful,
aren’t we?

Yeah! Nice expressions, everyone! This is
gonna make an awesome feature!
episode_event_academy_spring_2026/4006_1:
Thanks for flying us around
all day, Corviknight!

You too, Noctowl! Thanks to you,
we covered all the attractions!
Thanks from me too! You were awesome!
And, of course, Perrin and Sonia!
Because of you, I decided what I want to do!

All right! I’m gonna do what I can to make
this fair a blast!

That’s the spirit! Hyped students make the
best school fairs!
Wait... You two are students too, right?

There’s gotta be something you want to do
for the fair besides write an article.

Huh. I’ve been so busy taking photos,
I hadn’t thought about it.

Yeah. This is our chance to do something for
the fair as students, so we should take it.
I guess I should do a photo exhibition!

And maybe I’ll have a corner where people
can present Pokémon research!

That’d suit you two perfectly! I can’t wait to
see how they turn out!

Hehehe... Time spent with your buddies
doing something you love...

Those are the school memories you
never forget!
